name: Emirates Skywards Premium World Elite Mastercard®

welcome_offer.description: 50,000 bonus Skywards Miles after spending $3,000 in first 90 days (some sources report 70,000)

earning_rates.notes: 3x Skywards Miles per $1 on eligible Emirates purchases
1x Skywards Mile per $1 on all other purchases

lounge_access.other: Emirates lounge access (Emirates Business Class lounge access with qualifying spend)

other_benefits: Emirates Gold tier status for first year (with ability to retain through spend)
Silver tier status with $20K annual spend
0% introductory APR on balance transfers (first 12 billing cycles, within 45 days of account opening)

sources.notes: Barclays official Emirates Skywards Premium World Elite Mastercard page

deprecated_reason: Niche international airline co-brand. US searchers rarely seek these. Excluded from main listings.

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Application Credit
recurring_credits.description: Reimbursement for Global Entry ($120) or TSA PreCheck ($85) application fee. Renews every 4 years aligned with credential validity.
